sources.name: Transocean Rig Specifications (deepwater.com/our-fleet)
sources.format: Per-rig PDF spec sheets (binary/scanned) + HTML fleet pages
sources.freshness: Current fleet; spec sheets updated per rig; quarterly Fleet Status Reports
sources.notes: Authoritative owner data for drillships and semisubmersibles (e.g., Transocean Barents, Development Driller III). Each PDF gives LOA/beam/draft/displacement, variable deck load (VDL), crane capacities, water-depth/drilling capability. PDFs are image-based so need OCR for scraping. Named real units. Example: https://www.deepwater.com/documents/RigSpecs/Transocean%20Barents.pdf

sources.name: Valaris Fleet (valaris.com/our-fleet)
sources.format: HTML per-vessel pages + downloadable spec sheets
sources.notes: Drillships and semisubmersibles with design class (Samsung, F&G ExD Millennium), water depth, dimensions, VDL, drilling/crane specs. Named real units (VALARIS DS-4, MS-1, DPS-1).

sources.name: Heerema Marine Contractors Equipment Folder / Fleet
sources.format: HTML fleet pages + Equipment Folder PDFs (per-vessel data sheets)
sources.notes: Authoritative crane load charts (capacity vs radius) for SSCV Sleipnir (20,000t tandem; 20,000t @27-48m, 7,000t @62m, 4,000t @82m) and Thialf (14,200t tandem). Equipment folder PDFs include main/aux hoist curves, deck dimensions, hull particulars. Example: https://www.heerema.com/hubfs/HMC%20Equipment%20Folder_20211108.pdf

sources.name: Saipem Fleet (Saipem 7000 etc.)
sources.notes: Semisubmersible crane vessel particulars and lift capacity (2x7,000t cranes, 14,000t @42m). Owner-authoritative for heavy-lift / crane-curve layer.

sources.name: BSEE Data Center - Platform/Rig Information (Gulf of Mexico)
sources.notes: US Gulf of Mexico federal OCS structures incl. floating production. Location, structure type, install/abandon, production status, manning, heliport. Strong for identifying real named units and complexes; structural particulars are limited (no RAOs/mass properties). Metadata: https://www.data.bsee.gov/Mapping/Files/platform_meta.html

sources.name: Sokkeldirektoratet (Norwegian Offshore Directorate) FactPages / FactMaps
sources.format: Web database + open-data downloads (NLOD licence), ~30,000 datasets
sources.notes: Norwegian continental shelf facilities incl. FPSOs/semis/spars (e.g., Aasta Hansteen spar). Facility name, type, operator, water depth, in-service dates. Free open-government data; good for named NCS units. No mass props/RAOs.

sources.name: Offshore Magazine - Worldwide FPSO Survey / Posters
sources.freshness: Annual/periodic surveys (2022 latest free; newer behind EMA)
sources.notes: Free industry survey listing FPSO units worldwide with owner, operator, field, location, storage capacity, status. Good fleet census/cross-reference. Data sourced from Energy Maritime Associates (commercial). Storage/topsides detail; no engineering particulars like RAOs.

sources.name: Wikipedia (vessel/platform articles + lists)
sources.format: HTML articles with infoboxes; per-unit pages
sources.notes: Per-unit pages (SSCV Sleipnir, SSCV Thialf, Saipem 7000, Aasta Hansteen spar, Pioneering Spirit) give LOA/beam/draft/displacement/crane capacity with citations. Useful seed/cross-check layer; verify against primary sources. Covers all unit types incl. spars, drillships, FSRUs.

sources.name: Excelerate Energy & BW LNG fleet pages (FSRU)
sources.notes: Owner-authoritative FSRU particulars: storage capacity (125,000-263,000 m3), regas rate (MMscf/d), LOA up to ~290m, beam ~49m, draft 11-12m. Combine with BW LNG, Exmar, Hoegh LNG fleet pages for named-unit FSRU coverage.

sources.name: NOAA National Data Buoy Center (NDBC)
sources.notes: Free US buoy observations: Hs, Tp, wind, currents, water level. Foundation for site metocean characterization (GoM, US coasts). Observations not design criteria; combine with hindcast.

sources.name: Copernicus Marine Service (CMEMS) + ECMWF ERA5
sources.freshness: ERA5 hourly since 1940; CMEMS operational + reanalysis
sources.notes: Global/regional winds, waves, currents, water levels for extreme-value design metocean. Free with registration. Known caveat: ERA5 underestimates peak winds/extreme Hs (design risk) - apply corrections or regional hindcasts (NORA3 for North/Norwegian Sea). ERA5 via Copernicus CDS: https://cds.climate.copernicus.eu/

sources.name: BOEM Metocean Characterization Recommended Practices
sources.notes: US government recommended practice for metocean characterization (data sources, extreme-value methods). Methodology reference rather than dataset; aligns design metocean workflow with regulator expectations.

sources.name: DNV / ABS / Lloyd's Register rules & guidance (offshore units)
sources.format: HTML + free rule/standard PDFs (e.g., DNV-OS-C103, DNV-RP-C205)
sources.notes: Class rules define required stability/mass-property documentation and environmental (metocean) load bases. DNV-RP-C205 gives environmental conditions/loads; useful for criteria framing and unit-type definitions. Does not publish per-unit mass props/RAOs - those are confidential class deliverables.

sources.name: Academic / open-access RAO papers (ResearchGate, SCIRP, arXiv)
sources.format: Open-access PDFs with RAO plots/tables for example geometries
sources.notes: Generic/representative RAOs for FPSO, spar, semisub, TLP geometries (6-DOF, added mass/damping). NOT real named-unit data - useful as validation/benchmark and method reference only. Confirms RAO/mass-property layer has no public per-unit fleet source.

sources.name: Cranepedia - crane/vessel load charts
sources.format: HTML spec pages + downloadable load-chart PDFs
sources.notes: Aggregator offering load-chart PDFs (capacity vs radius, boom length) for crane vessels. Convenient cross-reference but secondary - validate against owner (Heerema/Saipem) data sheets before use.

paywalled_gaps: S&P Global Commodity Insights (formerly IHS Markit) Petrodata RigBase / RigPoint - the authoritative offshore rig & floating-unit fleet database (drillships, semis, FPSOs); detailed particulars, specs, contracts. PAID subscription.
Clarksons Research (World Fleet Register / Offshore Intelligence Network) - comprehensive vessel/unit particulars, owners, specs for FPSOs, FSRUs, MODUs. PAID.
Enverus (incl. legacy RigData) and Rystad Energy - floating production/rig fleet analytics and particulars. PAID.

Energy Maritime Associates (EMA) Guide to Floating Production Systems / FPS database - the most complete FPSO/FPU/spar/semi census with engineering and contract detail; only summary survey posters are free via Offshore Magazine. PAID.

Mass properties (lightship weight, VCG/LCG/TCG, radii of gyration, weight distribution) - essentially NOT public for any named unit; held by owners/yards/class. No free or paid open dataset found; would require per-project data or estimation.

Motion RAOs per named unit (6-DOF transfer functions, added mass/damping, QTFs) - NOT public; confidential naval-architecture deliverables. Only generic academic examples exist. Largest engineering gap.
Full hydrodynamic panel models / GDF meshes and stability booklets for specific units - confidential to operator/class/yard; not publicly available.
recommended_priority: Heerema Marine Contractors Equipment Folder / Fleet
BSEE Data Center - Platform/Rig Information (Gulf of Mexico)
Excelerate Energy & BW LNG fleet pages (FSRU)
Offshore Magazine - Worldwide FPSO Survey / Posters
DNV / ABS / Lloyd's Register rules & guidance (offshore units)
Academic / open-access RAO papers (ResearchGate, SCIRP, arXiv)
